LanguageData.FishingPond_StageOne.label: basic fishing pond
LanguageData.FishingPond_StageOne.description: A manually managed fishing pond. It is cheap to place, but catches are slow and labor intensive.
LanguageData.FishingPond_StageTwo.label: improved fishing pond
LanguageData.FishingPond_StageTwo.description: An upgraded pond with feed-and-cycle management. Colonists spend only brief time restocking, then the pond produces fish automatically.
LanguageData.FishingPond_StageThree.label: leisure fishing pond
LanguageData.FishingPond_StageThree.description: An advanced pond with better stock management and leisure access. It keeps producing fish and can also be used for recreation.
LanguageData.DO_SardineRaw.label: sardine
LanguageData.DO_SardineRaw.description: Fresh sardine from the pond. Small but plentiful fish for simple meals.
LanguageData.DO_ShrimpRaw.label: shrimp
LanguageData.DO_ShrimpRaw.description: Pond shrimp. Delicate seafood that can be eaten raw in emergencies or cooked into meals.
LanguageData.DO_SquidRaw.label: squid
LanguageData.DO_SquidRaw.description: Squid harvested from a stocked improved pond. Dense and useful for higher-value food processing.
LanguageData.DO_OctopusRaw.label: octopus
LanguageData.DO_OctopusRaw.description: A large octopus catch from an advanced leisure pond. Rare and valuable seafood.
LanguageData.DO_TunaRaw.label: tuna
LanguageData.DO_TunaRaw.description: Premium tuna from an advanced pond cycle. High nutrition and high market demand.
